message:
refactor(test): strengthen bench schema stage validation and generalize mutex guard lifetime

bench_schema.rs:
- Add cross-validation between stage_summary counts and actual matrix cell
  stage_attribution data, ensuring cells_with_complete_stage_breakdown and
  cells_missing_stage_breakdown match observed counts derived from iterating
  matrix_cells
- Validate that reported missing_cells entries correspond to cells actually
  observed to be missing stage metrics, with partition+size key cross-checks
- Fix borrow iteration over expected_required_stage_keys array (reference
  iteration instead of move)
- Add clone() on partition_size_key to support both dedup set and missing
  cell tracking

perf_regression.rs:
- Generalize recover_poisoned_mutex_guard lifetime from 'static to 'a,
  making the function usable with non-leaked Mutex instances
- Remove Box::leak allocations in poison recovery tests, using stack-local
  Mutex instead — eliminates deliberate memory leaks in test code
- Pass &lock references instead of leaked 'static references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
